name: map
description: Spec-to-bead correlation layer. Owns the mapping file (.bead-map.json) that links spec node IDs to bead IDs. Provides CRUD operations, deterministic preflight checking, and CLI query interface.

requirements.title: Store mapping records
requirements.description: Read/write .bead-map.json. Each record links a spec node ID to a bead ID with structured metadata: module name, component/section name, content file path, spec hash at time of mapping.

requirements.title: Preflight checking
requirements.description: Given a bead ID, resolve mapping record to spec node, check dependency readiness across the spec graph, report status deterministically.

requirements.title: Query mappings via CLI
requirements.description: spex map get <record-id> returns structured JSON with module, component, content path, and metadata. spex map list shows all mappings. spex check <bead-id> runs preflight.

requirements.title: Deterministic preflight
requirements.description: Same mapping state + same spec state always produces the same preflight result. No LLM calls, no external state.

requirements.title: Validate mapping file against schema
requirements.description: MappingStore validates .bead-map.json against the bead-map JSON Schema on load. Invalid files produce a clear error before any CRUD operation.

components.name: MappingStore
components.description: Read/write .bead-map.json. CRUD operations on mapping records. Each record links a spec node ID to a bead ID with structured metadata.

components.name: PreflightChecker
components.description: Deterministic preflight for /implement and /review skills. Resolves bead to mapping record to spec node, checks dependency readiness, reports status.

components.name: MapCommand
components.description: CLI entry point for spex map and spex check. Wires MappingStore and PreflightChecker to serve queries and preflight checks.

data_flows.name: Bead creation mapping flow
data_flows.description: When Apply creates a bead, it calls MappingStore to create a mapping record. The record ID is stored as the bead label. Skills query mappings via MapCommand.

data_flows.name: Preflight checking flow
data_flows.description: Skill reads bead label, extracts record ID, calls spex map get to retrieve structured spec info, then reads spec content using the returned file path.
